findings.title: Heartbeat config refresh path lacks a regression test
findings.impact: The PR adds LogSampleConfigPb to heartbeat responses, and clients also apply heartbeat-delivered configs, but the new coverage only verifies proto parsing and initial register delivery. If a worker sampling policy changes after a client is already connected, a regression in heartbeat population or client application would leave the client on stale sampling rates without any test failing.
findings.fix: Add an end-to-end or component test that connects a client, changes the worker sampler config after registration, sends or waits for a heartbeat, and asserts the client LogSampler snapshot changes to the new request/access/diagnostic ppm values while invalid heartbeat configs retain the previous-good snapshot.
